Dame Karen Bradley

Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands

I'm Karen Bradley, Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands. Please have a browse of my website, where you will find information about what I have been doing recently.

Sign up to my newsletter

The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Thank you

A huge thank you to my fantastic team and thank you to everyone in Staffordshire Moorlands who voted for me. I am honoured and humbled to be re-elected as your Member of Parliament. I will do my very best to continue to be a strong voice both locally and in Parliament for the people of the Moorlands.

Sign the Petiton Keep the Moorlands out of Stoke

I am very proud to be from the Moorlands, it is my home. We should not be forced into a devolution deal or combined authority against our will, and the decisions that matter to us should continue to be taken in the Moorlands. I have made that point in the House of Commons, both to the Minister and the Prime Minister, but have been disappointed by their responses.

I can assure you that I will continue to fight to stop us being forced into any unsuitable deal.

Sign the petition to send a message to the Labour Government that we say NO to a merger with Stoke:

 

Sign the Petition

The Year of the Moorlands Village

I am delighted to announce that I will be featuring the lovely villages/hamlets of Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme for the month of May.

Month 12 - May

Is Karen your MP?

Am I your MP?

In Parliament

My contributions in Parliament

Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Survey

If you live in Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme, please do fill in my The Year of the Moorlands Village residents survey and tell me your views and concerns.

Please email me on karen.bradley.mp for individual cases - I am here to help. 

To fill in my survey click here

Dame Karen Bradley MP Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands
